package rulecoverage

func PositiveBusyWaiting() string {
    ruleID := "busy_waiting"
    family := "context"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "select { default: ... } inside loops, which often spins instead of blocking."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
